General.Name: Perfect Optronics Limited
General.Description: Perfect Optronics Limited, an investment holding company, engages in development, trading, and sale of display and optics products and related electronic components in Hong Kong, Mainland China, and Taiwan. Its product portfolio includes thin film transistor liquid crystal display panels and modules, driver ICs, polarizers, electronic signage, optics products, health related products, and other products. The company also develops electronic product application; wholesales, imports, and exports display panels and related electronic components; offers technical support and related services; research and development and sale of optics related products; and designs, develops, and sells applied optics-related products, and digital information signage and electronic shelf display products. In addition, it provides personal hygiene and disinfectant products under the K-clean brand. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in To Kwa Wan, Hong Kong. Perfect Optronics Limited is a subsidiary of Winful Enterprises Limited.
General.Address: New Lee Wah Centre, To Kwa Wan, Hong Kong

1.Name: Mr. Ka Wing  Tse ACCA, HKICPA
